name: split_diff_pair_ports
short_description: Remove differential pair relationship between 2 ports
full_help:
split_diff_pair_ports

Description: 
Remove differential pair relationship between 2 ports

Syntax: 
split_diff_pair_ports  [-quiet] [-verbose] <ports>...

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  <ports>     Ports to split

Categories: 
PinPlanning

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
